Testing Actions Performed: Built React app and captured Home page screenshot.
Expected Results: Home page renders with storefront navigation.
Actual Results: npm run build passed; screenshot capture included in deliverables.

Testing Actions Performed: POST /api/shoppers with a valid shopper payload.
Expected Results: Shopper is created in MongoDB shopper collection.
Actual Results: Shopper created during smoke test; Mongo shopper count is 1.
Comments: Frontend Sign Up page uses this endpoint.

Testing Actions Performed: POST /api/shoppers twice with the same email.
Expected Results: Second request returns 409 conflict.

Testing Actions Performed: Created, updated, and deleted a temporary shopper.
Expected Results: Shopper can be modified and removed through REST endpoints.
Actual Results: Updated name was 'CRUD Shopper Updated' and delete returned True.

Testing Actions Performed: GET /api/products after MongoDB startup.
Expected Results: Seeded products are returned from MongoDB products collection.
Comments: Initial seed comes from server/products.json when collection is empty.

Testing Actions Performed: POST /api/products with valid category, unit, and price.
Expected Results: New product receives an auto-generated productID.
Comments: Admin Product Management uses this endpoint.

Testing Actions Performed: Created, updated, and deleted a temporary product.
Expected Results: Product can be edited and deleted through REST endpoints.
Actual Results: Updated description was 'CRUD Temp Product Updated' and delete returned True.

Testing Actions Performed: POST /api/products with price 0.
Expected Results: API rejects price less than or equal to zero.

Testing Actions Performed: POST /api/products without category.
Expected Results: API rejects missing category/unit.

Testing Actions Performed: PUT then GET /api/shopping-cart/:cartSessionID.
Expected Results: Cart item snapshots are persisted and reloaded.
Comments: Storefront syncs cart changes to this endpoint.

Testing Actions Performed: DELETE /api/shopping-cart/:cartSessionID for a temporary cart.
Expected Results: Temporary cart is removed.

Testing Actions Performed: POST /api/orders with customer, shipping, billing, and cart data.
Expected Results: Order is stored as pending and shopper email is registered.
Comments: Checkout page sends this same document shape.

Testing Actions Performed: PUT /api/orders/:id with status approved.
Expected Results: Order status changes from pending to approved.
Comments: Admin review buttons use this endpoint.

Testing Actions Performed: POST /api/orders with an empty cart.
Expected Results: API rejects checkout without cart items.

Testing Actions Performed: PUT /api/orders/:id with invalid status maybe.
Expected Results: API rejects unsupported order status.

Testing Actions Performed: POST /api/returns for an existing order/email.
Expected Results: Return request is saved with requested status.

Testing Actions Performed: PUT /api/returns/:returnID with status resolved.
Expected Results: Return request status updates in MongoDB.
Comments: Admin Returns queue uses this endpoint.

Testing Actions Performed: POST /api/returns for a missing order ID.
Expected Results: API rejects return request for unknown order.

Testing Actions Performed: Queried MongoDB collection counts with mongosh.
Expected Results: All required collections contain persisted records.
Actual Results: Counts: shopper=1, products=4, carts=1, orders=1, returns=1.

Testing Actions Performed: Ran node syntax check and Parcel production build.
Expected Results: Server parses and frontend build completes.
Actual Results: node --check server/server.js passed; npm run build passed.
Comments: Final verification repeated after deliverable generation.
